ranked_gaps.required_shape: forall {sigma : RelLanguage} (M : RelStructure sigma) {n : Nat} {phi : Formula sigma (n + 1)}, HasUnguardedFOLocalityRadius M phi -> HasUnguardedFOLocalityRadius M (Formula.ex phi)

ranked_gaps.required_closure: Lean proves quantified formula locality transport, including existential quantification
Lean proves formula-radius construction by structural recursion over all relevant formula constructors
Lean proves the actual Pk1 theorem, not only a shell or status-lock
Lean proves 2vK itself or a formally sufficient bridge from completed Pk1
